notes: Fusion ranking uses cross-sectional z-scored model outputs with rolling-IC weights.
Positive regime scalars do not change cross-sectional ranks; they are preserved for auditability.
Dry-run mode writes a report but does not place trades or persist audit rows.

report.message: Insufficient matured live history for rolling signal-risk checks; the greyscale run stays on seeded fusion weights.

audit_trail.message: Cap each name at the maximum single-stock weight.
Keep sector deviation versus benchmark within the configured band.
Reduce gross exposure by 20% per round for up to three rounds if 99% CVaR breaches the floor.
Nudge the book into the target beta band when it breaches the hard bounds.
Cap one-period turnover at the configured limit.
Maintain a diversified minimum number of holdings.
Run a simple market shock stress test without modifying weights.
